verdict_reasoning: TMED10 (TMP21/p23) is a type I single-pass transmembrane protein of the p24 family. The NCBI summary explicitly states it is localized to both the plasma membrane and Golgi cisternae, making it a dual-localization protein with a documented minority PM pool alongside its dominant Golgi/COPI vesicle trafficking role. As a type I TM protein, when it reaches the plasma membrane it presents an extracellular domain accessible from outside the cell. This satisfies the contextual criterion via dual_localization.
